query_normalized: predicting the impact of processing temperature on the grain size of rolled aluminum alloys materials science
rationale: The paper investigates the relationship between annealing temperature and grain size in Zinc Oxide (ZnO) thin films, which is a distinct material system and processing method (sol-gel) from the user's specific question regarding rolled Aluminum Alloys.
